title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
summary: Chase AI reviews 17 plugins and tools for Claude including design, productivity, and data integration options. Featured tools span Playwright, GitHub CLI, Firecrawl, LightRAG, Stripe CLI, and specialized skills for Claude code generation and task automation.
writeup: Chase AI walks through 17 plugins and tools that extend Claude across design, productivity, and data integration. The lineup includes Playwright for browser automation, GitHub CLI, Firecrawl for web scraping, LightRAG for retrieval, and Stripe CLI for payments, plus specialized skills aimed at code generation and task automation. The throughline is connecting Claude to external CLIs and services so it can act as an agent rather than answer in isolation.
